===Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer===
[[File:Bianca B2W2 Trailer.png|thumb|250px|Bianca as seen in the animated trailer]]
Bianca appeared in the [[Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer]], where she gave {{ga|Nate}} his [[first partner Pokémon]].
